Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-57435 affecting package rubygem-nokogiri for versions less than 1.19.4-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-57435 affecting package rubygem-nokogiri for versions less than 1.19.4-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package rubygem-nokogiri is earlier than 1.19.4-1, affected by CVE-2026-57435
